The '''third moon of Erai''' was a terrestrial [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> located in the [[Erai system/Legends|Erai system]], a part of the [[Hangshan sector/Legends|Hangshan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA Erai" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point long before<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> [[Eralam]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]] were [[Mining/Legends|mined]] on the moon. When the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Bombardment of the third moon of Erai|bombarded]] the third moon of Erai, much of what remained there became shattered, with the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] becoming exceedingly rare.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The third moon of Erai was first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KOTOR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Erai [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the third moon of Erai, in grid square P-11.<ref name="TEA Erai" />
